title: Disc
description: adds 25 new discs to the game
body: disc is a mod that adds 25 different discs to the game! they are craftable using different concrete. here is a video showing some discs being played:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ro_S9CCFPiI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
